sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59554" key="kra=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρᾶ</orth>, shortd. jestingly for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κράνος</foreign> (as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δῶ</foreign> for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δῶμα</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.85</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
